scripts.backend:stage: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='backend-rust/target-runtime'; cargo build --offline --manifest-path backend-rust/Cargo.toml; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force backend-rust/bin | Out-Null; try { Copy-Item backend-rust/target-runtime/debug/kraken-unleashed-backend.exe backend-rust/bin/kraken-unleashed-backend.exe -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Host 'backend-rust/bin is locked; Electron can use backend-rust/target-runtime/debug directly.' }"
